UserObject.mermaidData:
{
  "data": "erDiagram
    USERS {
        int id PK
        varchar user_name
        varchar email UK
        varchar password
        varchar about
    }

    ROLES {
        int id PK
        varchar name UK
    }

    USER_ROLE {
        int user_id FK
        int role_id FK
    }

    CATEGORIES {
        int categoryId PK
        varchar title
        varchar description
    }

    POSTS {
        int postId PK
        varchar post_title
        longtext content
        varchar imageName
        datetime addedDate
        int category_id FK
        int user_id FK
    }

    COMMENTS {
        int id PK
        varchar content
        int post_id FK
        int user_id FK
    }

    %% Relationships based on our JPA Mappings
    USERS ||--o{ POSTS : "places (mappedBy user)"
    CATEGORIES ||--o{ POSTS : "contains (mappedBy category)"
    POSTS ||--o{ COMMENTS : "has (mappedBy post)"
    USERS ||--o{ COMMENTS : "writes (fetch LAZY)"
    
    %% Many-to-Many Join Table Links
    USERS ||--o{ USER_ROLE : "has"
    ROLES ||--o{ USER_ROLE : "assigned-to"
",
  "config": null
}
